channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 2034 World Cup visitors will live in 'a bubble' and not see real life, Saudi rights activist says
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Soccer fans visiting Saudi Arabia for the 2034 World Cup will live in a “bubble” during the tournament that does not reflect real life there, a Saudi rights activist warned on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Soccer icon Alex Morgan makes waves for Rady Children’s Giveathon: how to help
item.description: This holiday season, former San Diego Wave FC star Alex Morgan is spreading some cheer by way of her foundation and support of the annual iHeart Rady Children’s Giveathon.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Wander Franco's sex abuse trial has been postponed 5 months
item.description: PUERTO PLATA, Dominican Republic (AP) — The trial against Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco, who has been charged with sexually abusing a minor, sexual and commercial exploitation against a minor, and human trafficking, was postponed on Thursday and scheduled to resume June 2, 2025.
item.dc:creator: MARTIN ADAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Travis Hunter, the 2-way standout for Colorado, is the AP college football player of the year
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Travis Hunter is a throwback-type player — an elite receiver one moment, a lockdown cornerback the next — who rarely leaves the field and has a knack for making big plays all over it.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick 'always wanted' to give college coaching a try. Now he will at North Carolina
item.description: New North Carolina football coach Bill Belichick said he had long been interested in coaching in the college ranks.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Wander Franco trial postponed due to no-show witnesses
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays shortstop Wander Franco is scheduled to go to trial Thursday in the Dominican Republic in a sexual abuse case involving a 14-year-old girl.
item.dc:creator: MARTÍN ADAMES Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: With Dybantsa in the house, BYU blasts Fresno State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The highest rated recruit in BYU basketball history was at the Marriott Center Wednesday to watch his future team cruise to victory. AJ Dybantsa was witness to a 28-point drubbing by the Cougars over Fresno State, 95-67.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hawks rally for a 108-100 victory over the Knicks and a trip to the NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Trae Young had 22 points and 11 assists, De'Andre Hunter and Jalen Johnson outplayed the Knicks frontcourt and the Atlanta Hawks took their surprising NBA Cup run all the way to the semifinals in Las Vegas, beating New York 108-100 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA and players' union meet to discuss new CBA
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA and the league's players union met in person Wednesday to discuss a new collective bargaining agreement.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio politician proposes bill to make flag planting a felony after fight in Michigan rivalry game
item.description: An Ohio politician has seen enough flag planting by visiting sports teams. Republican state Rep. Josh Williams said Wednesday on social media he’s introducing a bill to make flag planting in sports a felony in the state. His proposal comes after the Nov.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick, University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill finalize coaching deal: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick has reportedly been tapped as the next head coach for the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Suzuki in trade talks with Astros for Kyle Tucker
item.description: CHICAGO— The hot stove is heading up for the Chicago Cubs during the 2024 Winter Meetings and the club is reportedly in trade talks for one of the best outfielders in baseball — Kyle Tucker.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Ohio lawmaker proposes bill to make ‘flag planting’ in Ohio State stadium a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee between the Michigan and Ohio State football teams, an Ohio state lawmaker has introduced a new bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony criminal offense.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, Fox 5

item.title: Lawmaker wants ‘flag planting’ at OSU to be a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee, a lawmaker introduced a bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC loses to Minnesota in shootout, 5-4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Marcus Johansson had a goal and two assists for the Minnesota Wild, who rallied for a 5-4 shootout win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Buccaneers & Habitat Hillsborough join forces for Holiday Home Build and Revival
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers and Habitat for Humanity of Hillsborough joined forces once again to address affordable housing in Hillsborough County.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 7 of the world’s best soccer clubs will play at the Rose Bowl in 2025
item.description: The FIFA Club World Cup 2025 is being hosted in the United States, and one of the venues selected to host group stage matches is the Rose Bowl. Matches at the Rose Bowl are scheduled for June 15, 17, 19, 21, 23 and 25, officials announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Kyle Whittingham will return for 2025 season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a simple two word statement that made a resounding statement throughout the University of Utah athletic department. "I'm back." And with that, Utes head football coach Kyle Whittingham announced he will return to the program for his 21st season in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CU Buffaloes & CSU Rams are bowl eligible
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— If you're struggling to remember, you're not alone. But the University of Colorado and Colorado State University are changing that narrative this year. For the first time since 2016, both Colorado schools are bowling this postseason. First up, No. 23 Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42
item.description: Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams had to pile up a veritable mountain of points, yards and time-of-possession advantage early on to give themselves even a chance against the Buffalo Bills' ferocious fourth-quarter rally and a historic six-touchdown performance by Josh Allen.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: Tagovailoa sealed it with a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime to help the Dolphins spoil Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years and beat the Jets for the ninth straight time in Miami.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tourigny wins 100th game as Utah HC beats Buffalo, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Michael Kesselring had a goal and an assist for the Utah Hockey Club, which handed the Buffalo Sabres their sixth straight loss with a 5-2 win at KeyBank Center on Saturday. "It's good for the confidence," Kesselring said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
